module: core services (api-helper, like, collect, cover, discover)

nodes.label: api-helper.js
nodes.description: Core API/utility helpers: fetch wrapper, HTML escaping, playback quality normalization, listen stats, song cloning, track detail modal, custom lyric system, artist resolution

nodes.label: apiJson(url, opts)
nodes.description: Fetch wrapper with optional AbortController timeout. Returns parsed JSON. Used extensively across all modules.

nodes.label: escHtml(s)
nodes.description: HTML-escape a string using innerText/textContent pattern

nodes.label: normalizePlaybackQuality(value)
nodes.description: Normalizes quality labels (jymaster, hires, lossless, exhigh, standard) to canonical values

nodes.label: playbackQualityLabel(value)
nodes.description: Chinese label for playback quality tier

nodes.label: playbackQualityRank(value)
nodes.description: Numeric rank 1-5 for quality comparison

nodes.label: readPlaybackQualityPreference()
nodes.description: Reads quality preference from localStorage, defaults to hires

nodes.label: savePlaybackQualityPreference()
nodes.description: Saves current quality preference to localStorage

nodes.label: updatePlaybackQualityUi()
nodes.description: Updates DOM elements for quality button, label, options; hides for YouTube tracks

nodes.label: setPlaybackQuality(value)
nodes.description: Sets playback quality, triggers SVIP check, updates UI and current track

nodes.label: applyPlaybackQualityToCurrentTrack(nextQuality)
nodes.description: Reloads current track at new quality using playQueueAt with qualitySwitch

nodes.label: loadListenStatsState()
nodes.description: Loads listen history/stats from localStorage, returns {history, songs, artists, updatedAt}

nodes.label: saveListenStatsState()
nodes.description: Saves listenStatsState to localStorage with updatedAt timestamp

nodes.label: currentCoverSong()
nodes.description: Returns the current song from playQueue[currentIdx] or currentLocalSong. Central accessor used by many modules.

nodes.label: songSourceLabel(song)
nodes.description: Returns Chinese label for song source (QQ音乐, YouTube, 本地上传, 网易云播客, 网易云音乐)

nodes.label: cloneSong(song)
nodes.description: Clones a song object and hydrates custom cover. Central cloning utility.

nodes.label: closeTrackDetailModal()
nodes.description: Closes track detail modal via GSAP closeGsapModal

nodes.label: openTrackDetailModal(type, songOverride)
nodes.description: Opens track detail modal with artist info or song comments, fetches data via apiJson

nodes.label: resolveArtistSongForDetail(song, artist)
nodes.description: Searches for artist song across netease/qq/youtube to open artist detail modal

nodes.label: setLyricSourceMode(mode, silent)
nodes.description: Switches between original and custom lyrics, saves preference per-song

nodes.label: readCustomLyricMap()
nodes.description: Reads custom lyric map from localStorage

nodes.label: saveCustomLyricMap()
nodes.description: Persists custom lyric map to localStorage

nodes.label: currentLyricSong()
nodes.description: Returns current song for lyrics (similar to currentCoverSong)

nodes.label: customLyricMap
nodes.description: Global variable storing custom lyrics keyed by song key, initialized at load

nodes.label: customLyricPrefs
nodes.description: Per-song preference for custom vs original lyrics

nodes.label: like.js
nodes.description: Like/heart system: cloud song detection, like toggling, YouTube local like storage, sync with Netease

nodes.label: isCloudSong(song)
nodes.description: Checks if song is a netease cloud song (not QQ, local, podcast, YouTube)

nodes.label: isSongLiked(song)
nodes.description: Checks likedSongMap or localStorage for YouTube likes

nodes.label: ensureLoggedInForAction()
nodes.description: Returns true if logged in, otherwise shows login modal and toast

nodes.label: updateLikeButtons(song)
nodes.description: Updates DOM heart-btn and collect-btn liked/busy state

nodes.label: toggleLikeSong(song)
nodes.description: Toggles like for a song. YouTube: localStorage. Netease: API call with optimistic UI.

nodes.label: toggleLikeCurrent()
nodes.description: Toggles like for the current cover song

nodes.label: syncLikeStatusForSongs(songs)
nodes.description: Batch checks like status with Netease API to sync likedSongMap

nodes.label: likedSongMap
nodes.description: Global map of song id -> boolean for liked status

nodes.label: likeBusyMap
nodes.description: Per-song lock to prevent concurrent like toggles

nodes.label: collect.js
nodes.description: Collect/playlist modal: open/close collect modal, render playlist targets, add song to playlist

nodes.label: openCollectModal(song)
nodes.description: Opens collect modal for a song. Supports YouTube (local only) and Netease (logged-in required)

nodes.label: closeCollectModal()
nodes.description: Closes collect modal and resets state

nodes.label: renderCollectModal()
nodes.description: Renders the collect modal with song info and user playlist list

nodes.label: createPlaylistFromCollect()
nodes.description: Creates new Netease playlist from collect modal, then adds target song

nodes.label: addCollectTargetToPlaylist(pid)
nodes.description: Adds currently targeted song to specified playlist via API

nodes.label: collectTargetSong
nodes.description: Global reference to the song being collected

nodes.label: collectBusy
nodes.description: Lock flag for collect operation

nodes.label: cover.js
nodes.description: Cover/image system: custom covers, cover proxy, URL sizing, cover caching for songs

nodes.label: readCustomCoverMap()
nodes.description: Reads custom cover map from localStorage

nodes.label: saveCustomCoverMap()
nodes.description: Persists custom cover map to localStorage

nodes.label: customCoverMap
nodes.description: Global map of song keys to custom cover data URLs

nodes.label: songCustomCoverKey(song)
nodes.description: Generates unique key for a song for custom cover lookup (qq/id/local/podcast/meta)

nodes.label: getCustomCoverForSong(song)
nodes.description: Returns custom cover if set, checking song.customCover first then customCoverMap

nodes.label: hydrateCustomCover(song)
nodes.description: Attaches customCover property to song if custom cover exists. Used in cloneSong.

nodes.label: songCoverSrc(song, size)
nodes.description: Returns cover URL: custom cover if set, else song.cover with size param. Central cover accessor.

nodes.label: coverProxySrc(url, cacheBust)
nodes.description: Proxies external cover URLs through /api/cover for CORS

nodes.label: coverUrlWithSize(url, size)
nodes.description: Appends size parameter to cover URLs (param=320y320)

nodes.label: setCustomCoverForCurrent(dataUrl, opts)
nodes.description: Sets custom cover for current song, saves to map, updates UI and shelf rebuild

nodes.label: discover.js
nodes.description: Home/discover page: listen stats tracking, daily recommendations, weather radio, home tiles/mosaic

nodes.label: homeListenSummary()
nodes.description: Returns {recent, topSong, topArtist, totalPlays} from listenStatsState

nodes.label: goHome()
nodes.description: Navigates to home page, sets forced state, loads weather and discover data

nodes.label: renderHomeDiscover()
nodes.description: Renders full home page: weather, daily songs, playlists, podcasts, tiles, mosaic backdrop

nodes.label: playHomeDaily()
nodes.description: Plays daily recommended songs from homeDiscoverState

nodes.label: loadHomeWeatherRadio(force, opts)
nodes.description: Fetches weather radio data (songs matched to local weather) via apiJson

nodes.label: loadHomeDiscover(force)
nodes.description: Loads daily recommendations, playlists, and podcasts from netease API

nodes.label: listenStatsState
nodes.description: Global state for listen tracking: history[], songs{}, artists{}

nodes.label: homeDiscoverState
nodes.description: Global state for home page: loading, loggedIn, songs[], playlists[], podcasts[]

nodes.label: homeWeatherRadioState
nodes.description: Global state for weather radio: weather, radio data, loading, city

nodes.label: listenSession
nodes.description: Current listening session tracker (key, song, startedAt, listenMs, progress)

nodes.label: songProviderKey(song)
nodes.description: Returns normalized provider key for a song (youtube/qq/netease). Defined in index.html
